Items.ActionText: This Resolution was Hearing Held by Committee

Items.Title: Resolution declaring July 2 annually in the City of New York as Freedom Day to commemorate the anniversary of the vote of the Second Continental Congress to declare independence from Great Britain in 1776
Items.ActionText: This Resolution was Hearing Held by Committee

Items.Title: Resolution declaring June 13 as New York Knicks Day in the City of New York to celebrate the contributions of the world-class basketball team to the City’s culture and civic identity

Items.MatterName: Declaring June 13 as New York Knicks Day.

Items.Title: Resolution calling on the New York State Legislature to introduce and pass, and the Governor to sign, legislation to amend the Education Law, in relation to requiring instruction on the history, contributions, and experiences of people of African descent in public schools

Items.ActionText: This Resolution was Hearing on P-C Item by Comm
Items.MatterName: Amend the Education Law, in relation to requiring instruction on the history, contributions, and experiences of people of African descent in public schools.

Items.Title: Resolution celebrating the historical documents that contributed to the birth of the United States of America and are on display at the New York Public Library as part of the nation’s 250th anniversary events

Items.ActionText: This Resolution was Hearing on P-C Item by Comm
Items.MatterName: Celebrating the historical documents that contributed to the birth of the United States of America and are on display at the New York Public Library as part of the nation’s 250th anniversary events.
